name: Security Report

---

> **For critical vulnerabilities**, please email the maintainer directly instead of opening a public issue. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for details.

## Vulnerability Type

- [ ] Injection (prompt injection, command injection, SQL injection)
- [ ] Authentication / Authorization bypass
- [ ] Credential exposure
- [ ] Container escape / sandbox bypass
- [ ] Information disclosure
- [ ] Denial of service
- [ ] Other

## Description

A clear description of the vulnerability.

## Impact

What could an attacker do with this vulnerability?

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...

## Suggested Fix

If you have a suggestion for how to fix this.

## Affected Components

Which part of SecureClaw is affected? (e.g., credential-proxy, container-backend, trust-engine)
